# Boon of Fortitude

You gain the following benefits.

## Fortified Health

Your [[hit_points|Hit Point]] maximum increases by 40. In addition, whenever you regain [[hit_points]], you can regain additional [[hit_points]] equal to your Constitution modifier. Once you've regained these additional [[hit_points]], you can't do so again until the start of your next turn.
